mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS trend reduces discount rates and signals aggressive liquidity support; when the recent policy-rate change is negative, the mechanism predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
regime_hint: monetary easing cycle near the zero lower bound
failure_condition: Reject if months with falling FEDFUNDS do not have higher 20-day SPX forward returns than non-falling months, or if the walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 for two consecutive years.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of UNRATE above 8 percent signals severe labor-market deterioration that lowers expected household income and corporate revenues, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60 percent of cases or if triggered mean returns are not below unconditional mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS crosses above its 3-month average while PAYEMS remains below its 3-month average, consumer demand is stabilizing before employment; this early-cycle demand turn predicts positive 20-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS crosses above its 3-month moving average while PAYEMS is below its 3-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value 346810 million dollars
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction trigger fails to outperform either RSAFS-only or PAYEMS-only signals by at least 25 basis points in average 20-day forward returns.

mechanism_narrative: A declining INDPRO trend indicates falling utilization, inventory liquidation, and earnings pressure in cyclical sectors; lower industrial production predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if falling 3-month INDPRO periods are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 60 percent of cases or have no negative return spread versus rising INDPRO periods.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of HOUST below 500 thousand annualized units marks housing construction capitulation; reduced new supply accelerates inventory clearing and predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below 500 thousand annualized units
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot value 466 thousand units
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST-below-500 triggers are followed by negative 60-day SPX returns in more than half of observations or if returns are lower than during non-triggered housing contractions.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL is falling while FEDFUNDS is below 0.5 percent, deflation raises real debt burdens and limits policy room; this liquidity-trap interaction predicts negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL-and-FEDFUNDS trigger does not predict lower 20-day returns than either low FEDFUNDS alone or falling CPIAUCSL alone.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp negative GDPC1 growth crossing signals broad demand contraction and collapsing earnings expectations; when real GDP growth falls below the threshold, S&P 500 returns are negative over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth crosses below -2 percent
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest snapshot value 11525.0 billions of chained 2017 dollars
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 growth below -2 percent is not followed by below-median 60-day SPX returns or if the signal has a nonnegative coefficient in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS contracts rapidly and UNRATE rises together, the labor shock forces near-term earnings downgrades and risk reduction; the joint labor deterioration predicts negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change < -1000 thousand and UNRATE rises > 0.5 percentage point over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot value 133768 thousand persons
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not have negative average 5-day SPX returns or if the interaction adds no predictive power beyond separate PAYEMS and UNRATE signals.
